calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Oct-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Kenney for and with Sountru (Trustee).
Thomas Worth for Alex Mayo (Beneficiary).
Nancy Rasch Guardian Ad Litem for Elizabeth Mayo.

Mr. Kenney stated that it makes sense to sell the property, but Elizabeth lives in the property, that the property could be made productive if rented to other people, that there are concerns about Alex's behavior in the past and that it could create problems for Elizabeth. Ms. Rasch stated that it makes sense for Elizabeth to fully divorce their interests, that Elizabeth has special needs, that she needs people/caregivers to live with her and that it is in Elizabeth's best interest to have full control of the house. Mr. Worth stated that Alex moved out of the property a year ago, that Alex has no strong reason to sell his interest to Elizabeth and that he has no intent to move back in. Mr. Worth also stated that he has not gone back to the house in the past year, that Alex could give his word, that Alex has adequate funds in his Trust to provide for his needs and that Alex does not feel it is necessary to sell his interest. Mr. Kenney stated that the value of the property is about $7,000,000.00, that if sold the funds would be invested, that Elizabeth would hold a 99 to 100% interest (all of the corporate entity), that the equal value of Alex's 40% would go into Alex's trust, that they each have two trusts and that the Trustee is providing weekly amounts of money to Alex. The Petition for Order Directing Capitalization of Entities and Sale of Trust Asset is continued for one week to October 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be deemed under submission on that date. Mr. Kenney is to provide a supplement regarding what the assets are in each of the four trust.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR 581, 888-575-3376.

Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To Sep-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Aug-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-21-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Myers for Sountru

Mr. Myers addressed the issue raised in the probate examiner's notes with regard to notice to Paul Caulfield and Debra Dolch, stated that he has no problem with providing notice, that the parties have been talking and that Mr. Worth is having problems contacting his client. Mr. Myers also stated that the Trustee for Judge Caulfield's Trust is the same as the Conservator for Elizabeth, they can do an ex parte petition for appointment of Nancy Rasch as Guardian Ad Litem, spoke of Elizabeth's capacity and medical condition, and requested 45-60 days continuance to clear procedural defects. The Petition for Order Directing Capitalization of Entities and Sale of Trust Assets is continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Order Directing Capitalization Of Entities And Sale Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-24-2018 Continued To Mar-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Myers for Sountru (Trustee).

Mr. Myers provided history, stated that he started with a notice of proposed action to purchase a one half interest in a house, that he provided an accounting and that it is being reviewed. Mr. Myers also stated that the matter can either go off calendar or be continued. The Petition for Order Directing Capitalization of Entities, etc. is continued to March 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if the parties will approve the transaction.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
